buyPlan.trigger: Use only the first orderly pullback to VWAP or breakout support; skip repeated VWAP breaks.

sellPlan.targetTime: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless it quickly seals limit-up.
sellPlan.strategy: Target the T+1 morning impulse after a mid-stage trend confirmation; take 3%+ quickly, only stronger front-row shapes aim for 5%-9%.
sellPlan.timeWindow: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless it quickly seals limit-up.

rules: Next morning weak open and cannot reclaim the late-session platform

Avoid widening the stop after purchase
